mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_approval ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_approval WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_approval WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT * FROM tb_approval WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_dept LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_approval WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_dept LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'

SELECT * FROM tb_approval WHERE status = #{status} AND (title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_dept LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_approval WHERE status = #{status} AND (title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR applicant_dept LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_approval (approval_id, type, title, content, applicant_name, applicant_dept, applicant_email, request_date, status, approver_name, approval_date, reject_reason, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantDept}, #{applicantEmail}, #{requestDate}, #{status}, #{approverName}, #{approvalDate}, #{rejectReason}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_approval SET type = #{type}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, applicant_name = #{applicantName}, applicant_dept = #{applicantDept}, applicant_email = #{applicantEmail}, request_date = #{requestDate}, status = #{status}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approval_date = #{approvalDate}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_approval WHERE applicant_email = #{email} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_approval WHERE applicant_email = #{email}

SELECT * FROM tb_approval WHERE (applicant_email = #{email} OR approver_name IN (SELECT approver_name FROM tb_approval WHERE applicant_email = #{email})) AND status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_approval WHERE (applicant_email = #{email} OR approver_name IN (SELECT approver_name FROM tb_approval WHERE applicant_email = #{email})) AND status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED', 'COMPLETED')
